nasb.text: Therefore if you have not been faithful in the use of unrighteous wealth, who will entrust the true riches to you?

esv.text: If then you have not been faithful in the unrighteous wealth, who will entrust to you the true riches?

cnv.text: 如果你們在不義的錢財上不忠心，誰還把真實的錢財託付給你們呢？

ccb.text: 如果你们不能忠心地处理今世的财富，谁会把真正的财富交托给你们呢？

csbs.text: 因此，你们如果在不义的财富上不忠心，谁会把真正的财富委托给你们呢？
